geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries 2017; area from SRA Dharavi Redevelopment Authority survey 2018

demographics.data_source: Population disputed (est 700K-1M per Census 2011 vs SRA estimates); density derived from area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Mumbai slum estimates; literacy from Census 2011 M-Ward; SC/ST share from Census 2011 SC/ST tables for Mumbai suburban

income_profile.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO 78th Round urban slum consumption expenditure data for Mumbai; informal rate from ILO India Informal Economy Report 2022 adjusted for Dharavi's known industrial composition; occupation mix from SPARC/NSDF Dharavi livelihood surveys 2019

commute_profile.data_source: Commute patterns from Mumbai Comprehensive Transportation Study (MCTS) 2016; metro Line 3 Aqua alignment from MMRDA; station proximity from Western Railway/Central Railway timetable maps; car ownership from Census 2011 household assets Mumbai suburban district

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Fare sensitivity calibrated from BEST fare hike ridership elasticity data 2016-2019 adjusted for income level; collective action threshold from Dharavi protest frequency records (Mumbai Mirror archives 2018-2023); loss aversion from behavioural economics literature on informal sector workers (Kahneman-Tversky adjusted for Indian urban poor, IGIDR working paper 2021); institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS Trust in Institutions Survey 2024 Mumbai sub-sample; political mobilisation from voter turnout data Dharavi Assembly segment 2019/2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Connection density estimated from TISS Dharavi community mapping study 2020; high clustering reflects caste/occupation-based settlement patterns; low cross-income bridging reflects spatial segregation; tier2 density from community leader surveys

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: SPARC/NSDF Dharavi industrial survey 2019; leather cluster is one of Asia's largest informal leather processing zones
Kumbharwada pottery colony census by TISS 2018; Gujarati potter community documentation
Chintan Environmental Research estimate; Dharavi processes ~80% of Mumbai's recyclable waste; employment from ILO informal waste sector study 2020
Garment embroidery and export units documented in MCGM industrial survey; SPARC fieldwork estimates
90 Feet Road is Dharavi's main commercial spine; footfall estimated from BEST bus stop boarding data + pedestrian counts (MCTS 2016)
Papad, pickle, and bakery units cluster; estimated from FSSAI informal food enterprise registration data for M-East ward 2022
13th Compound is a major mixed-use industrial zone within Dharavi; metal fabrication, plastic processing documented in SRA redevelopment surveys 2018
Transit Road vegetable and provisions market serving Dharavi residents; footfall from MCGM market license records extrapolation
Soap and detergent small-scale manufacturing cluster; estimated from MSME registration data for M-East ward
Small-scale jewellery and costume jewellery manufacturing; SPARC livelihood survey 2019
Vendors near Mahim station junction serving commuter traffic; footfall from Western Railway boarding data + BEST ridership at Mahim bus depot
Street market at Dharavi-Sion interface near Sion station; estimated from Central Railway Sion station exit counts
Plastic granulation and recycling units; distinct from general recycling node; Chintan Environmental Research 2020 estimates
Bakery and biscuit manufacturing units supplying local and wholesale markets; estimated from FSSAI registration and MCGM trade license data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Dense Low-Income zone template from AGENT_SPEC.md; validated against NSSO 78th Round occupation data for Mumbai M-East ward and SPARC/NSDF Dharavi livelihood surveys

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 agent counts estimated from MCGM ward-level elected representatives, Dharavi community organisation mapping (TISS 2020), and local press corps records
